updates.title: Faster conversations
updates.summary: Improved conversation loading and response speed.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: Improved mobile display, fixed responsive bugs, and updated skills.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: This update improves chat history responsiveness.
items: Optimized the conversation list loading logic.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: This update adds a one-shot planning mode for conversations.
items: Added Plan mode to let the agent prepare a structured plan before responding.
Plan mode applies only to the next message and automatically returns to normal chat after submission.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: This update expands potato knowledge retrieval capabilities.
items: Added a potato spatial transcriptomics information query skill.
Integrated the PlantScience.ai knowledge graph into potato information retrieval.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: This update increases the file upload size limit.
items: Increased the file upload size limit to 200 MB.

updates.title: Workspace updates
updates.summary: This update fixes bugs and improves page scrolling behavior.

updates.title: Hermes Agent 0.16.0
updates.summary: Hermes Agent has been upgraded with new functional analysis support.
items: Added a GO/KEGG analysis skill for enrichment and pathway analysis workflows.
Added the supporting GO/KEGG database for the new analysis skill.
